On November 19, 2025, ReposiTrak, Inc. held its Annual Meeting of Stockholders where several key proposals were voted on. An announcement from Loma Negra Compania Industrial Argentina Sociedad Anonima ( (LOMA) ) is now available.

On November 20, 2025, Loma Negra released its unaudited consolidated condensed interim financial statements for the period ending September 30, 2025. The company reported a net profit of 15.7 million Argentine pesos for the nine months, a significant decrease from the 160.4 million pesos reported in the same period in 2024. This decline is attributed to reduced net revenues and increased financial expenses. Despite the challenging financial results, the company’s total assets increased to 1.85 billion pesos from 1.72 billion pesos at the end of 2024, indicating growth in its asset base.
